pair.old: Kia recommends that you contact an authorized Kia dealer/service partner.
pair.new: Kia recommends that you contact an authorized Kia dealer/service partner.

pair.old: We recommend that you use batteries for replacement from an authorized Kia dealer/service partner.
pair.new: We recommend that you use batteries for replacement from an authorized Kia dealer/service partner.

pair.old: Seek assistance from a professional workshop for the installation of the wiring harness.
pair.new: Seek assistance from a professional workshop for the installation of the wiring harness.

pair.old: Kia recommends visiting an authorized Kia dealer/service partner.
pair.new: Kia recommends visiting an authorized Kia dealer/service partner.

pair.old: SRS and pre-tensioners contain explosive chemicals. If you scrape a vehicle without removing the SRS and pre-tensioners, it may cause a fire. Before scraping a vehicle, consult an authorized Kia dealer.
pair.new: SRS and pre-tensioners contain explosive chemicals. If you scrape a vehicle without removing the SRS and pre-tensioners, it may cause a fire. Before scraping a vehicle, consult an authorized Kia dealer.

pair.old: Have and authorized Kia dealer/service partner assist with installing the wiring harness.
pair.new: Have and authorized Kia dealer/service partner assist with installing the wiring harness.

pair.old: Visit an authorized Kia dealer/service partner.
pair.new: Visit an authorized Kia dealer/service partner.
